summary: First testing run for LOGI SEO Booster. All 25 backend pytest cases passed (auth, sites CRUD, Wix mock fallback, audit, Claude Sonnet 4.5 content generation, drafts CRUD + versions/rollback, publish with Wix unavailable path, publish-logs, mocked performance, dashboard stats). Frontend smoke tests passed: login + register flow, sidebar nav (7 links + site switcher), and add-site dialog all working end-to-end with backend integration confirmed (new site appears immediately and active site switcher updates).

minor.issue: Returns 401 when no token, but message is 'Token manquant' — acceptable. Could also return 403 in stricter REST conventions.
Pydantic Literal validation for label is case-sensitive (e.g. 'logirent' lowercase rejected). Documented but worth noting for client devs.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~990 lines, currently still readable as a single file but approaching the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules (auth.py, sites.py, wix.py, audit.py, content.py, drafts.py, publish.py, performance.py) before the next iteration.
JWT_SECRET default value in /app/backend/.env contains the literal 'change-me-in-production' — make sure this is rotated before going live.

wix_api_key is stored in plain text in MongoDB (the SitePublic model only hides it from API responses). Consider encrypting at rest (Fernet) or at minimum noting this in security docs; the UI already labels it 'Chiffrée' which is currently misleading.
create_wix_draft_post sends body_markdown as a single TEXT node — markdown won't be rendered correctly on Wix. For real publishing, markdown→Wix RichContent conversion is required.
FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI 0.100+ — should migrate to lifespan handler.
_audit_page URL regex r'^https?://[^/]+/[a-z0-9-/]*$' is overly strict (rejects query strings/dots) — but only flags as 'low' so non-blocking.
test_credentials: Tests register fresh users on the fly (test_<random>@logitest.fr / testpass123). Demo creds demo@logirent.fr / demo1234 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md are not pre-seeded; would need to be registered manually.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. Each pytest run creates and deletes its own user/site/draft. UI smoke run leaves one user + one site behind (uitest_*@logitest.fr / 'UI Test Logirent').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend & frontend MVP is solid. The 'Chiffrée' label on the API key in /sites is currently a UI claim only — at rest it's stored plain text in MongoDB. If main agent adds encryption, retest the create_site flow + DB inspection. Wix integration is intentionally mocked (fake API key), so /api/sites/{id}/pages always returns 5 mock pages and publish always logs 'wix_unavailable' — that is correct behaviour for this MVP and should not be flagged as a bug. AI content generation takes ~20-40s; tests use a 90s timeout.
